narrative:
Perrysburg I (precinct in Wood County) has 1,122 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a clear Republican lean of 6.5 percentage points.
